nodes.name: Creamy Tomato Soup with Grilled Cheese Dippers
nodes.description: name: Creamy Tomato Soup with Grilled Cheese Dippers | short_description: A kid-friendly classic — velvety tomato soup served with crispy whole-wheat grilled cheese strips for dunking. | meal_suggesti
nodes.premise: Meal: Creamy Tomato Soup with Grilled Cheese Dippers - name: Creamy Tomato Soup with Grilled Cheese Dippers | short_description: A kid-friendly classic — velvety tomato soup served with crispy whole-wheat grilled cheese strips for dunking. | meal_suggestion: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil, add canned crushed tomatoes and a splash of milk or cream, then blend until smooth. Season with basil, salt, and pepper. Serve in a bowl alongside whole-wheat grilled cheese cut into sticks for easy dipping. A drizzle of olive oil on top adds richness. | nutrition_note: Tomatoes are rich in lycopene and vitamin C; whole-wheat bread provides fiber and complex carbs; cheddar adds calcium and protein. Milk contributes additional calcium. Keep cream or milk portions moderate to manage fat; using part-skim cheese or reduced-fat milk can lighten the dish while preserving flavor.

nodes.name: Teriyaki Chicken Rice Bowl
nodes.description: name: Teriyaki Chicken Rice Bowl | short_description: Sweet and savory teriyaki-glazed chicken over steamed rice with steamed broccoli and shredded carrots — colorful, balanced, and easy to eat. | mea
nodes.premise: Meal: Teriyaki Chicken Rice Bowl - name: Teriyaki Chicken Rice Bowl | short_description: Sweet and savory teriyaki-glazed chicken over steamed rice with steamed broccoli and shredded carrots — colorful, balanced, and easy to eat. | meal_suggestion: Pan-sear bite-sized chicken pieces until golden, then toss in a homemade teriyaki glaze (soy sauce, honey, garlic, ginger). Serve over steamed rice with steamed broccoli florets and shredded carrots on the side. Garnish with sesame seeds and sliced scallions for a restaurant-style touch. | nutrition_note: Chicken breast provides lean protein; broccoli is rich in vitamin C, vitamin K, and fiber; carrots add beta-carotene. Rice supplies energy from carbohydrates. Homemade teriyaki lets you control sugar and sodium — use low-sodium soy sauce and moderate honey to keep it balanced.

nodes.name: Mini Meatball Pasta Bake
nodes.description: name: Mini Meatball Pasta Bake | short_description: Tender turkey meatballs baked with whole-wheat penne in marinara sauce and topped with melted mozzarella — hearty comfort food with a nutritious twi
nodes.premise: Meal: Mini Meatball Pasta Bake - name: Mini Meatball Pasta Bake | short_description: Tender turkey meatballs baked with whole-wheat penne in marinara sauce and topped with melted mozzarella — hearty comfort food with a nutritious twist. | meal_suggestion: Mix ground turkey with breadcrumbs, egg, garlic, and Italian seasoning; roll into small meatballs and bake at 400°F for 15 minutes. Toss cooked whole-wheat penne with marinara sauce and the meatballs in a baking dish, top with shredded mozzarella, and bake 10 more minutes until bubbly. Serve with a side of steamed green beans or a small salad. | nutrition_note: Ground turkey is a leaner alternative to beef, providing protein with less saturated fat; whole-wheat pasta adds fiber for sustained energy; marinara sauce supplies lycopene from tomatoes. Mozzarella provides calcium. Watch portion sizes of cheese and pasta to manage calories; pair with vegetables for a more complete meal.
